Custom Cookies
Every cookie is
a work of art.

🍪 Custom Cookies are now available year-round! Submit an inquiry at least 3 weeks from today to check my availability!

Please note: Holidays are generally reserved for pre-sales — custom orders will usually not be accepted.

Birthdays

Birthday Celebration Set

Elegant black, pink & gold designs — personalized with names, ages, and messages. Perfect for milestone birthdays.

Graduation

Grad Celebration Set

Custom colors, names, and class years. Caps, gowns, tassels — we make every grad feel like a star.

Holidays & Events

Holiday Cookie Sets

From 4th of July to Christmas, we design themed sets for every holiday and seasonal celebration.

Sports & Teams

Custom Sports Sets

Team colors, jerseys, helmets, and custom player names. The ultimate fan gift for any sport or team.

Nature & Floral

Butterfly & Floral Sets

Intricately hand-painted designs perfect for garden parties, bridal showers, and spring celebrations.

Back to School

School & Teacher Gifts

Adorable grade pennants, pencils, and school-themed sets. A sweet treat for the first (or last) day!

Why Sweet Smiles

Small batch.
Big flavor.

🌾

Real Ingredients

No artificial flavors or preservatives. We use real butter, fresh eggs, and quality chocolate — always.

👩‍🍳

Baked to Order

Every box is baked fresh when you order. No sitting on shelves — just oven-warm goodness at your door.

📦

Local Delivery

We deliver same-day to your door. Perfect for last-minute gifts, celebrations, or a well-deserved treat.

💌

Custom Orders

Personalized boxes, event packaging, and custom flavors available. Make your next event unforgettable.
